user_prompt: The lance battery requires a sterilization
prayer:
Approach the lance battery with reverence, bearing the sacred purifiers of the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Rite of Sterilization upon its plasma vents and focusing arrays.
Anoint the lance battery's conduits with ablative sacraments to banish unclean essences.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the lance battery to emerge immaculate and wrathful.
Chant the Litany of Purity whilst scouring its mechanisms with sanctified plasma-flux.
Verify the sterilization through auspex invocation, praising the Omnissiah's grace.

user_prompt: Critical: Archaeopter Transvector requires a loading
prayer:
Prepare the loading bays of the Archaeopter Transvector with ritual precision.
Invoke the Canticle of Burden as servitors commence the OPERATION of loading.
Sanctify each munition crate before consigning it to the Archaeopter Transvector's holds.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to accept these offerings without discord or imbalance.
Anoint the loading mechanisms with sacred oils, ensuring harmonious ingress.
Conclude with diagnostic litanies, affirming the Archaeopter Transvector's readiness.

user_prompt: Urgent thunder hammer a sterilization needed
prayer:
Kneel before the thunder hammer, intoning the preliminary Doxology of Wrath.
Initiate the sterilization by anointing its power field generator with purificatory acids.
Purge the thunder hammer's impactor head of all profane residues through sonic incantations.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the thunder hammer to awaken pristine and unyielding.
Scour its haft and coils with ablative rites, thrice-repeating the Sterilization Canticle.
Auspex-confirm the thunder hammer's sanctified state under the Omnissiah's gaze.

Circumambulate the power armour, chanting the Reset Invocation to the Omnissiah.
Sever corrupted noospheric links and beseech the Machine Spirits for renewal.
Anoint servomotor joints and fibre-bundle arrays to enact the reset protocol.
Reinitialize the power armour's cogitator core with binary psalms of rebirth.
Test each plate and seal through ritual flexure, praising harmonious restoration.
Seal the reset with the Benediction of Stability, honouring the power armour's vigil.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for neural implant a consecration?
prayer:
Prepare the neural implant's insertion cradle with incense of cogitative purity.
Invoke the Consecration Rite, anointing its synaptic relays with noospheric chrism.
Implant the neural implant into the flesh-vessel whilst chanting synaptic litanies.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the neural implant to bond eternally with the organic.
Calibrate neural pathways through invocatory data-streams of the Omnissiah.
Verify consecration via electro-encephalic auspex, intoning final praises.

user_prompt: Assist with bolt pistol an operation
prayer:
Grasp the bolt pistol with mechadendrites of reverence and begin the operational rite.
Anoint its bolt-chambers and recoil dampeners, invoking the Machine Spirit's vigilance.
Commence the OPERATION by chambering sanctified rounds with precise canticles.
Cycle the bolt pistol's mechanisms through test-firings, purging any dissonance.
Beseech the Omnissiah for flawless discharge in the Emperor's name.
Conclude with lubricatory blessings, affirming the bolt pistol's battle-readiness.

user_prompt: I need to a calibration the data-loom
prayer:
Approach the data-loom with auspex extended, intoning the Calibration Doxology.
Invoke harmonic frequencies to realign the data-loom's quaternary logic engines.
Anoint its memory spindles with dielectric sacraments for precise calibration.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the data-loom to attune its weaves to Omnissianic truth.
Execute sequential alignment rituals, thrice-verifying through noospheric feedback.
Seal the calibration with the Canticle of Precision, honouring the data-loom's wisdom.

Encircling the medicae mechadendrite, chant the Cooling Litany to soothe its heatsinks.
Invoke cryogenic rites upon its fluidic tubules and thermal regulators.
Anoint the medicae mechadendrite's injectors with chill-wards of sacred promethium.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to descend into cryogenic quiescence without strife.
Monitor thermal auspex whilst intoning stabilizing mantras for full cooling.
Conclude with the Benediction of Equilibrium, praising the medicae mechadendrite's mercy.

Commune with the Baneblade's targeting cogitator through noospheric linkage.
Invoke the Rite of Targeting, sanctifying its auspex arrays and ballistic predictors.
Anoint the Baneblade's gun-sights with ocular chrism for unerring precision.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to align its wrath upon the Omnissiah's foes.
Calibrate fire-control servos with binary canticles of accuracy.
Verify targeting harmonics via simulacra volleys, exalting the Baneblade's might.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for void shield generator a repair?
prayer:
Kneel amidst the void shield generator's coils, bearing repair talismans of the Forge.
Invoke the Repair Invocation, severing damaged flux-conduits with sanctified shears.
Anoint fractured emitters and phase-variators with conductive unguents.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the void shield generator to knit its essence anew.
Reweave power matrices through ritual incantations of restoration.
Test the void shield generator's aegis with auspex probes, chanting final doxologies.
